name: io.github.VLab-Software/easyeda-pro-mcp
description: MCP server and EasyEDA Pro extension bridge for live project assistance.

environmentVariables.name: EASYEDA_MCP_WS_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Optional WebSocket host for the local EasyEDA Pro bridge. Defaults to 127.0.0.1.

environmentVariables.name: EASYEDA_MCP_WS_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Optional WebSocket port for the local EasyEDA Pro bridge. Defaults to 8765.
